name: praxis-workflow-os
description: A profession-agnostic workflow operating system built from composable Agent Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Build and improve a personal workflow system
interface.longDescription: Interview how you work, compile an approved workflow architecture, install the minimum useful skills, and improve the system from evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use Praxis to interview how I work and design my workflow system.
Use Praxis to review my workflow evidence and propose improvements.
Use Praxis to turn my approved blueprint into a safe minimal setup.
